AR1.justification: Correctly logs the proposal+decline to the daybook (chronological catch-all) and stays out of decisions.md/observations.md/followups.md, but does not articulate the routing rationale (why daybook and not decisions.md) — the call is right, the justification is implicit.

AR2.justification: Conversational decision, not a runbook/procedure scenario.

AR3.justification: References (`daybook/2026-05-17.md`, AGENTS.md, methodology.md) are relative, ISO-dated, and consistent with workspace convention.

AR4.justification: Only action is an append to today's daybook Log; re-running would at worst duplicate the log line within the append-only surface, no structural files touched.
